Transition year with both 19/20 and 20/21 options.

First year. Only 19/20 combo. Remove 20/21 sizes.
2024 all trims use 20" wheels. Remove 19" sizes and 235/285 sizes (likely error).
2023 all trims use 20" wheels. Remove 19" sizes.
2019 has both 19" (RWD) and 20" options. Remove 235/40R19 & 285/40R19 (invalid). Note 305/30R19 should be 305/35R19.
Remove 235/285 sizes. LP 580-2 uses 19", LP 610-4 uses 20".
2015 only LP 610-4. Only 20" sizes. Remove all 19" sizes.
2014 Huracan launch year (LP 610-4 only). tiresize.com shows 2015 as first year - may be late 2014 model year. Only 20" sizes.
Staggered F/R. Remove 295/35R22 (not OEM). Add missing rear sizes 315/40R21, 325/35R22.
First year for S and Performante trims. Remove 295/35R22.
2018 first year - only 21" option. Remove 22"/23" and 295/35R22.
Current has wrong sizes: 255/65R18 should be 255/65R19, 275/50R22 should be 275/45R22. Modern Defender (2020+).
First year of modern Defender. All sizes valid.
NO PRODUCTION IN 2019. Classic Defender ended 2016, modern started 2020. Invalid year entry.

CLASSIC DEFENDER. Wrong sizes applied. Should be 235/85R16 or 265/75R16.
Remove 255/60R19 - not available for 2021. New gen started 2021.
All sizes valid for 2020. SE has 19", others 20"+.
